info.name: OpenCatalogi - Publication Quality Metrics (MQA/FAIR + DQV)
info.description:
API-only contract tests for the metadata-quality scoring (publication-quality-metrics change, PQM-001..004). Asserts the authenticated per-catalog quality roll-up (average/worst-N/missing breakdown), anonymous rejection, and optional DQV exposure in the DCAT feed. Per the Playwright-UI-only / Newman-API convention the scoring + roll-up backend is asserted here (the dashboard widget reuses the analytics widget surface).

Variables:
- baseUrl (default http://localhost:8080)
- catalogSlug: a catalog with publications
- dqvCatalogSlug: a catalog with dqvExposure=true
- userAuth: Basic auth for an authenticated publisher

exec: pm.test('has average (0-100)', () => typeof doc.average === 'number' && doc.average >= 0 && doc.average <= 100);
pm.test('has distribution + worst + missingBreakdown', () => doc.distribution && Array.isArray(doc.worst) && doc.missingBreakdown !== undefined);
pm.test('worst entries carry a dimension breakdown', () => doc.worst.every(w => w.dimensions && typeof w.total === 'number'));

item.name: PQM-002 DQV measurements present when catalog opts in

exec: // When DQV exposure is on, datasets carry dqv:hasQualityMeasurement nodes.
pm.test('DQV measurements are QualityMeasurement nodes with a value', () => d['dqv:hasQualityMeasurement'].every(m => m['@type'] === 'dqv:QualityMeasurement' && m['dqv:value'] !== undefined));

item.name: PQM-002 DQV absent by default (no dqv: nodes)

exec: pm.test('no dqv:hasQualityMeasurement when exposure off (default)', () => datasets.every(d => d['dqv:hasQualityMeasurement'] === undefined));
